meaning: adj.小的,指小的,小型的n.小的人,指小辞,指小词,爱称
examples: Her eyes scanned the room until they came to rest on a diminutive figure standing at the entrance.
She was a diminutive figure beside her husband.
Its shape indicates the diminutive, human-like species Australopithecus afarensis had arches in its feet.
But suddenly the diminutive Mr Vitorino has been able to take a giant leap forward.
